name: win-hooks
description: Auto-patches Codex plugin hooks for Windows compatibility by adding commandWindows wrappers.

interface.shortDescription: Repair Codex plugin hooks on Windows
interface.longDescription: win-hooks scans installed Codex plugins and adds Windows-specific commandWindows wrappers for hook commands that assume Unix shells, .sh scripts, or non-Windows dispatch.
defaultPrompt: Check Codex plugin hook compatibility on Windows
